# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextApiRequest, NextApiResponse } from 'next'

async function streamData(req: NextApiRequest, res: NextApiResponse) {
  const { readableStreamBody } = req;

  if (!readableStreamBody) {
    return res.status(400).json({ error: 'No readableStreamBody found' });
  }

  // Create a new Writable Stream from the response object
  const writableStream = res.createWriteStream({
    headers: req.headers,
    send: false,
  });

  try {
    // Pipe the user's readable stream into the writable stream created above
    await new Promise((resolve) => {
              readableStreamBody.pipeTo(writableStream, { end: false })
                .on('finish', resolve);
            });

    // Flush and end the response to complete the streaming process
    writableStream.end();
    res.status(200).json({ success: true });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error(error);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'An error occurred while streaming data' });
  }
}

export default streamData;
